mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_ACCESS_LOG (req_id, service_name, user_id, user_name, department, client_ip, session_id, menu_id, uri, http_method, user_agent, access_time, partition_key, http_status, total_duration_ms, result_code, hash_prev, hash_cur) VALUES (#{reqId}, #{serviceName}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{department}, #{clientIp}, #{sessionId}, #{menuId}, #{uri}, #{httpMethod}, #{userAgent}, #{accessTime}, #{partitionKey}, #{httpStatus}, #{totalDurationMs}, #{resultCode}, #{hashPrev}, #{hashCur})

INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_ACCESS_LOG (req_id, service_name, user_id, user_name, department, client_ip, session_id, menu_id, uri, http_method, user_agent, access_time, partition_key, http_status, total_duration_ms, result_code, hash_prev, hash_cur) VALUES
(#{v.reqId}, #{v.serviceName}, #{v.userId}, #{v.userName}, #{v.department}, #{v.clientIp}, #{v.sessionId}, #{v.menuId}, #{v.uri}, #{v.httpMethod}, #{v.userAgent}, #{v.accessTime}, #{v.partitionKey}, #{v.httpStatus}, #{v.totalDurationMs}, #{v.resultCode}, #{v.hashPrev}, #{v.hashCur})

INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_SQL_LOG (req_id, service_name, user_id, user_name, department, client_ip, session_id, menu_id, uri, access_time, partition_key, sql_id, sql_type, sql_text, bind_params, affected_rows, duration_ms, target_db, target_table, pii_detected, error_message, hash_prev, hash_cur) VALUES (#{reqId}, #{serviceName}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{department}, #{clientIp}, #{sessionId}, #{menuId}, #{uri}, #{accessTime}, #{partitionKey}, #{sqlId}, #{sqlType}, #{sqlText}, #{bindParams}, #{affectedRows}, #{durationMs}, #{targetDb}, #{targetTable}, #{piiDetected}, #{errorMessage}, #{hashPrev}, #{hashCur})

INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_SQL_LOG (req_id, service_name, user_id, user_name, department, client_ip, session_id, menu_id, uri, access_time, partition_key, sql_id, sql_type, sql_text, bind_params, affected_rows, duration_ms, target_db, target_table, pii_detected, error_message, hash_prev, hash_cur) VALUES
(#{v.reqId}, #{v.serviceName}, #{v.userId}, #{v.userName}, #{v.department}, #{v.clientIp}, #{v.sessionId}, #{v.menuId}, #{v.uri}, #{v.accessTime}, #{v.partitionKey}, #{v.sqlId}, #{v.sqlType}, #{v.sqlText}, #{v.bindParams}, #{v.affectedRows}, #{v.durationMs}, #{v.targetDb}, #{v.targetTable}, #{v.piiDetected}, #{v.errorMessage}, #{v.hashPrev}, #{v.hashCur})
mapper.select: SELECT hash_cur FROM COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_ACCESS_LOG ORDER BY log_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT hash_cur FROM COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_SQL_LOG ORDER BY log_id DESC LIMIT 1

where.if: AND pii_detected IS NOT NULL AND pii_detected LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search3}, '%')

mapper.select: SELECT HOUR(access_time) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_ACCESS_LOG WHERE partition_key = #{date} GROUP BY HOUR(access_time) ORDER BY hour
SELECT service_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_ACCESS_LOG WHERE partition_key = #{date} GROUP BY service_name ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT pii_detected AS pii, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_SQL_LOG WHERE partition_key = #{date} AND pii_detected IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pii_detected ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_ACCESS_LOG WHERE partition_key=#{date}) AS access_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_SQL_LOG WHERE partition_key=#{date}) AS sql_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_SQL_LOG WHERE partition_key=#{date} AND pii_detected IS NOT NULL) AS pii_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_ACCESS_LOG WHERE partition_key=#{date}) AS user_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT service_name) FROM COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_ACCESS_LOG WHERE partition_key=#{date}) AS service_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_XAUDIT_ACCESS_LOG WHERE partition_key=#{date} AND result_code='FAIL') AS fail_cnt
